---
description: 'Always apply WCAG 2.2 Level AA accessibility standards'
applyTo: '{apps,packages}/**/*.{ts,html,scss}'
---

# Accessibility

Code MUST conform to [WCAG 2.2 Level AA](https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG22/). Use the `accessibility-a11y` skill for detailed guidance on specific patterns.

1. Before generating, plan how to implement WCAG 2.2 compliance.
2. After generating, review against WCAG 2.2 and iterate until accessible.
3. Tell the user the code was built with accessibility in mind but may still have issues. Suggest [Accessibility Insights](https://accessibilityinsights.io/) for testing. Do not explain the accessibility features unless asked.

**Toolkit ARIA**: When using `@ngx-signal-forms/toolkit`, do NOT manually add `aria-invalid`, `aria-required`, or `aria-describedby` — these are managed automatically by `NgxSignalFormAutoAriaDirective`.
